mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS userId, u.student_id AS userNo, u.real_name AS userName, u.college_id AS collegeId, c.college_name AS collegeName, u.class_id AS classId, u.status, u.create_time AS createTime, u.update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_college c ON u.college_id = c.id
AND u.student_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentId}, '%')
AND u.status = #{status}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_role ur WHERE ur.user_id = u.id AND ur.role_id IN (2, 3) )
ORDER BY u.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (student_id, password, real_name, college_id, class_id, status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{collegeId}, #{classId}, #{status})
